description_long: This bungalow features a modern, angular design with a low-pitched, multi-faceted roof covered in dark shingles. The exterior walls are clad in a textured stone veneer, giving the structure a robust and contemporary appearance. Large, dark-framed windows dominate one side, providing ample natural light and a sleek contrast to the stonework. The building has a unique, irregular footprint with a recessed entryway and a garage door visible on one end. The roof includes a central cut-out or skylight, adding architectural interest and likely enhancing interior illumination. The overall aesthetic is clean and geometric, with a focus on horizontal lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern stone-clad bungalow with a dark, multi-faceted roof, large windows, and a garage, featuring a unique angular layout and central skylight.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main facade with the entryway, large windows, and the angular roof with a central cut-out.
description_view_1: From this angle, the elongated side with extensive dark-framed windows and the sharp roof angles are most prominent.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the full width of the bungalow, the recessed central section, and the continuity of the stone cladding.
description_view_3: This end view displays the garage door, a side entry, and the solid stone wall with minimal window openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped side windows
